hooks.prompt:
Check if .solution-audit-latest.json exists in the current project root. If it exists, read it and:
1. If 'stale' array is non-empty, display: '⚠ Audit stale: [dimension names] — files changed since last audit. Run /audit or relevant /audit-* command to refresh.'
2. Display a brief (2-3 line) reminder of the top 3 unresolved findings by severity. Format: 'Solution Audit: [N] pending findings — top: [brief description of top 1-3 items]'
3. If .solution-audit-wip.md exists in project root, display: '📋 WIP audit in progress: .solution-audit-wip.md'
If the file does not exist, output nothing.
